concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Tap Roots: The Art of Jazz Dance

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Holmes
about_quotes.evidence: when I was with Cootie's band, we had a show composed of the Ink Spots, Ella Fitzgerald, Eddie Vinson, Ralph Brown, dancers.

about_quotes.speaker: Quentin Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: we went on the road with a show with the Mills Brothers... We had Ralph Brown who was a very good dancer in those days.

about_quotes.speaker: Lillie Delk Christian
about_quotes.evidence: Or could it be Ralph Brown or uh. Maybe Stump. That name sounds familiar.
